member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity
member.summary: Base type for entities that need explicit invariant protection and business event collection.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity.BusinessEvents
member.summary: Gets the business events recorded by the entity since the last dequeue.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity.RecordBusinessEvent(TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Events.IBusinessEvent)
member.summary: Records a meaningful business event after a legitimate state change.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity.Ensure(TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule)
member.summary: Enforces a single invariant rule immediately.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity.EnsureAll(System.Action{TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification})
member.summary: Enforces multiple independent invariant rules and fails with the aggregated violations.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.BusinessEntity.DequeueBusinessEvents
member.summary: Returns the currently recorded business events and clears the internal queue.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Events.BusinessEvent
member.summary: Base record for business events captured by entities and aggregates.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Events.BusinessEvent.#ctor(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Base record for business events captured by entities and aggregates.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Events.IBusinessEvent
member.summary: Represents a meaningful business occurrence emitted by the model after a legitimate state change.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Events.IBusinessEvent.OccurredAt
member.summary: Time when the business event occurred.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.AggregatedBusinessRuleViolationException
member.summary: Represents a set of business rule violations collected together before failing.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.AggregatedBusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Creates an exception containing multiple violated business rules.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.AggregatedBusinessRuleViolationException.Violations
member.summary: Gets the collected violation messages.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException
member.summary: Base exception for violated business invariants and illegal business transitions.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an exception for a violated business rule.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Exceptions.BusinessRuleViolationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates an exception for a violated business rule with an inner cause.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification
member.summary: Collects multiple independent business rule violations before throwing.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification.Violations
member.summary: Gets the collected violation messages.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification.HasViolations
member.summary: Gets whether at least one business rule violation has been collected.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification.Collect(TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule)
member.summary: Executes a rule and collects its violation instead of failing immediately.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification.CollectIf(System.Boolean,System.Func{TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule})
member.summary: Lazily executes a rule only when the supplied condition is true.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.BusinessNotification.ThrowIfAny
member.summary: Throws when any collected violation exists.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule
member.summary: A focused, testable rule that protects an important business truth.

member.name: P:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of the protected business truth.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Invariants.IBusinessInvariantRule.EnsureIsPreserved
member.summary: Throws when the business truth is not preserved.

member.name: T:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Transitions.BusinessTransition`1
member.summary: Represents an explicit business transition between two meaningful states.

member.name: M:TrustableCode.SDK.BusinessModeling.Transitions.BusinessTransition`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,`0)
member.summary: Represents an explicit business transition between two meaningful states.
